title: Uruguayan Roast Chicken
description: Deliciously roasted chicken with a hint of Uruguayan flavor, inspired by the country's love for grilled meats.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, dried roast, and Uruguayan seasoning blend.
Rub the garlic-roast mixture all over the chicken, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and put it in the oven.
Roast the chicken for 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
